welcome_offer.description: You may be eligible for as high as 200,000 Membership Rewards® Points after spending $15,000 in eligible purchases on your new Card in your first 6 months of Card Membership. Welcome offers vary and you may not be eligible.

earning_rates.notes: Earn 4X in the 2 categories where your business spends the most each billing cycle (on first $150,000 combined purchases per calendar year, then 1X)

annual_credits.name: Business Supplies Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $20 per month in statement credits for purchases at FedEx, Grubhub, or Office Supply Stores with your Business Gold Card. Enrollment required.

other_benefits: Access to Amex's unique 4x category rotation based on your spending
